creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
I understand that somebody tried to "fix" some problem but the result is more broken ports tree...

ports/Mk/bsd.ldap.mk clearly states that:

# WANT_OPENLDAP_SASL
#            - User-defined variable to depend upon SASL-enabled OpenLDAP
#              client. Must NOT be set in a port Makefile.

So please remove it from affected ports like net/samba43 or database/ldb etc.

How the change to use WANT_OPENLDAP_SASL in Makefile could have been committed? 
Aren't committers there pro prevent bugs like this?

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2017-January/106525.html
